underlying_goal: Execute the next commit step (C02 python-skeleton) in a structured commit protocol, and fix Windows encoding errors blocking the workflow
friction_detail: Claude's first encoding fix missed generate_domain_map.py causing the error to recur, and staged files outside Rex's domain causing pre-commit hook to block the user's commit
brief_summary: User wanted to execute commit step C02 and resolve a Unicode encoding error; the commit landed but follow-up encoding fix was incomplete and domain boundary violations blocked the user's subsequent commit.
